contractCoverage.obligation: Real daemon capture ingestion, built extract CLI, atomic staging, replay, zero-output, invalid-schema and timeout convergence preserve graph state.
Worker owns provider, daemon owns graph/policy, capture-only sources leave daemon, raw outputs are not retained, and no fallback executes.
Audit resolves authoritative turn keys with verified provenance, renders unavailable states, and never mutates graph content.
Built CLI help, malformed input, worker outcome, audit and stats surfaces are exercised with exact exit behavior.

adversarialCases.scenario: Invalid provider schema and 121-second provider execution.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Typed failure only, no source ledger, identical sources remain selectable, no raw output retention, and process group is killed/reaped.

adversarialCases.scenario: Valid empty output followed by a repeated worker invocation.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Success run ledgers every source and prevents provider reinvocation.

adversarialCases.scenario: Non-capture turn-key nodes, invalid/off modes, invalid command, fallback sentinel, stream overflow, and hook spawn failure.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: No unauthorized source transmission, provider fallback, graph write, raw-data leak, or hook failure propagation.

adversarialCases.scenario: Stale NodeId, unique authoritative turn-key fallback, ambiguous duplicate turn key, missing and mismatched live source.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Unique verified source resolves; ambiguous/missing/mismatch fails conservatively and candidate audit update is rejected.

adversarialCases.scenario: Help invocation and incomplete candidate audit update.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Help exits 0 with options; incomplete update exits 2 and requires --support.

adversarialCases.scenario: Search MCP production source for four prohibited R3 identifiers.
